user_message: Hey, can you triage this for Quantum Analytics? Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-05 11:19 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Quantum Analytics

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 13:41 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Quantum Analytics
Date: 2024-03-14
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), Kevin (Quantum Analytics)

[00:02:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:05:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:07:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

[00:13:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.

[00:16:00] Kevin (Quantum Analytics): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:19:00] Kevin (Quantum Analytics): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:23:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:28:00] Kevin (Quantum Analytics): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:30:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:35:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
